org.apache.paimon.utils

Class ProjectedRow

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.paimon.utils.ProjectedRow
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    DataGetters, InternalRow

    public class ProjectedRow
extends Object
implements InternalRow
    An implementation of InternalRow which provides a projected view of the underlying InternalRow.

    Projection includes both reducing the accessible fields and reordering them.

    Note: This class supports only top-level projections, not nested projections.

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface org.apache.paimon.data.InternalRow

    • Method Detail

      • replaceRow

        public ProjectedRow replaceRow(InternalRow row)
        Replaces the underlying InternalRow backing this ProjectedRow.

        This method replaces the row data in place and does not return a new object. This is done for performance reasons.

      • getFieldCount

        public int getFieldCount()
        Description copied from interface: InternalRow
        Returns the number of fields in this row.

        The number does not include RowKind. It is kept separately.

        Specified by:
        getFieldCount in interface InternalRow

      • getRowKind

        public RowKind getRowKind()
        Description copied from interface: InternalRow
        Returns the kind of change that this row describes in a changelog.
        Specified by:
        getRowKind in interface InternalRow
        See Also:
        RowKind

      • getDecimal

        public Decimal getDecimal(int pos,
                          int precision,
                          int scale)
        Description copied from interface: DataGetters
        Returns the decimal value at the given position.

        The precision and scale are required to determine whether the decimal value was stored in a compact representation (see Decimal).

        Specified by:
        getDecimal in interface DataGetters

      • getTimestamp

        public Timestamp getTimestamp(int pos,
                              int precision)
        Description copied from interface: DataGetters
        Returns the timestamp value at the given position.

        The precision is required to determine whether the timestamp value was stored in a compact representation (see Timestamp).

        Specified by:
        getTimestamp in interface DataGetters

      • getRow

        public InternalRow getRow(int pos,
                          int numFields)
        Description copied from interface: DataGetters
        Returns the row value at the given position.

        The number of fields is required to correctly extract the row.

        Specified by:
        getRow in interface DataGetters

      • from

        public static ProjectedRow from(int[][] projection)
                         throws IllegalArgumentException
        Like from(int[]), but throws IllegalArgumentException if the provided projection array contains nested projections, which are not supported by ProjectedRow.

        The array represents the mapping of the fields of the original DataType, including nested rows. For example, [[0, 2, 1], ...] specifies to include the 2nd field of the 3rd field of the 1st field in the top-level row.

        Throws:
        IllegalArgumentException
        See Also:
        Projection, ProjectedRow

      • from

        public static ProjectedRow from(int[] projection)
        Create an empty ProjectedRow starting from a projection array.

        The array represents the mapping of the fields of the original DataType. For example, [0, 2, 1] specifies to include in the following order the 1st field, the 3rd field and the 2nd field of the row.

        See Also:
        Projection, ProjectedRow

      • from

        public static ProjectedRow from(Projection projection)
        Create an empty ProjectedRow starting from a Projection.

        Throws IllegalStateException if the provided projection array contains nested projections, which are not supported by ProjectedRow.

        See Also:
        Projection, ProjectedRow
